# Collin Henkel

**Data Science • Mathematics • Machine Learning**

I am a Data Science and Mathematics student at the University of Nebraska–Lincoln with experience in data analysis, SQL, and machine learning. My work focuses on building data-driven insights from structured datasets and developing reproducible analysis workflows.

This portfolio highlights selected projects involving statistical modeling, data validation, and applied machine learning.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Projects

-   [Health Risk Modeling Analysis](projects.qmd#health-risk-modeling-analysis)
-   [Business Data Analysis Report](projects.qmd#business-data-analysis-report)

[View all projects →](projects.qmd)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Skills

-   **Programming:** Python (pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn), R, SQL\
-   **Tools:** Tableau, Excel, Jupyter, Git\
-   **Methods:** Regression, Classification, Statistical Inference, Data Validation

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Contact

-   Email: collinh929\@gmail.com\
